remember: Students will be able to recall the basic characteristics of electromagnetic waves.
Students will be able to list the various forms of electromagnetic waves.
Students will be able to identify the properties of electromagnetic waves.
understand: Students will be able to explain the production of electromagnetic waves.
Students will be able to describe the propagation of electromagnetic waves through a medium.
Students will be able to explain the reflection and refraction of electromagnetic waves.
apply: Students will be able to use the equation for the speed of electromagnetic waves in a vacuum.
Students will be able to apply the concept of electromagnetic waves to solve problems related to their properties.
Students will be able to use the formula for the energy of electromagnetic waves.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between the frequency and wavelength of electromagnetic waves.
Students will be able to compare the properties of different forms of electromagnetic waves.
Students will be able to evaluate the effects of the medium on the propagation of electromagnetic waves.

ncert_objectives: Explain the basic characteristics of electromagnetic waves.
Describe the production of electromagnetic waves and their propagation through a medium.
Discuss the reflection and refraction of electromagnetic waves.
board_exam_objectives: Speed of electromagnetic waves in a vacuum.
Properties and characteristics of electromagnetic waves.
Energy of electromagnetic waves and their forms (e.g. radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light, ultraviolet, X-rays, gamma rays).
